name: Johnan Academic Preparatory Institute, Inc.
summary: Johnan Academic Preparatory Institute, Inc. engages in the education business primarily in Japan. It manages cram schools and other various classrooms, as well as provides recruitment and management guidance for preparatory schools and entrance classes. The company also plans, produces, and sells teaching materials for university, high school, junior high school exams; and engages in the infant education and childcare activities, as well as web learning systems. In addition, it franchises its preparatory schools. The company was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Kawasaki, Japan.
